response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The provided Reference JSON listed 'SIX FEET UNDER' for the second scene, but the actual song in the video is 'Gold Unbalance'. 2. JSON Usage: Discarded the incorrect Reference JSON lyrics and fully manually transcribed the Japanese and English lyrics for 'Gold Unbalance' and the preceding intro segment. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are strictly timed to the vocal delivery, including aggressive truncation for the rapid-fire rap section to ensure the translation flows naturally.

subtitles.english: Whew! And the outfit, too! Look at how shiny... shiny.

subtitles.english: Wait, hold... hold on. I got... I...

subtitles.english: Close enough!

subtitles.english: And we've also got King's car as well.

subtitles.original: And then... well, you Dead Beats, you're all on your way to the next stage, so you're not there yet.

subtitles.english: I'll think about it.

subtitles.english: Not a bad idea. I think Peace-san is listening to that, so I'll have to talk to her about it later.

subtitles.english: Welcome to the future.

subtitles.english: Anyway, Dead Beats, I gotta do a quick costume change and scene change.

subtitles.english: So let's get out of here, and I'll sing some more songs...

subtitles.original: All right, I'll catch you guys there. Time for a 変身！ 行くぞ！
subtitles.english: All right, I'll catch you guys there. Time for a transformation! Let's go!

subtitles.original: 不確かな物語に
subtitles.english: In an uncertain story,

subtitles.original: 勝ち獲るはアイデンティティ
subtitles.english: what I will win is identity

subtitles.original: 荒れ果てた手札を
subtitles.english: The ruined hand of cards

subtitles.original: しまい込んで
subtitles.english: I'll tuck them away

subtitles.original: 時に止まらない愛を捧げきっちゃう
subtitles.english: And sometimes dedicate my unstoppable love entirely

subtitles.original: 感情はノンフィクションで喜怒哀楽
subtitles.english: My emotions are non-fiction, with ups and downs

subtitles.original: 一進一退 際どい勝負
subtitles.english: Back and forth, a close battle

subtitles.original: 失敗も 絶望も 味わえばワンダフル
subtitles.english: Even failure and despair, if tasted, are wonderful

subtitles.original: ゴールド・アンバランス
subtitles.english: Gold Unbalance

subtitles.original: 意味なんてないような世界で
subtitles.english: In a world that seems to have no meaning,

subtitles.original: 偶然を重ねた光
subtitles.english: the light piled up from coincidences

subtitles.original: 脈打つ鼓動 誰にもなれない防壁
subtitles.english: A pulsing heartbeat, unable to become anyone else

subtitles.original: 言葉を紡いでゆく
subtitles.english: I will spin my words

subtitles.original: なめんじゃないよ
subtitles.english: Don't underestimate me!

subtitles.original: 小さな勇気と覚悟があれば十分
subtitles.english: A small amount of courage and resolve is enough

subtitles.original: 強気で行こうよ
subtitles.english: Let's go strong!

subtitles.original: ハートをセッション ２人ならやれるさ
subtitles.english: Our hearts in a session, if it's the two of us we can do it!

subtitles.original: Back to back no matter what's
subtitles.english: Back to back no matter what's

subtitles.original: 俺達の無敵なラッキースポット
subtitles.english: Our invincible lucky spot

subtitles.original: 世界中を止めてたってパス
subtitles.english: Even if the whole world stops, we pass

subtitles.original: シャットアウト 誰も邪魔できないこのルート
subtitles.english: Shut out, nobody can get in the way of this route

subtitles.original: 何回だって何万通りだって
subtitles.english: No matter how many times, in tens of thousands of ways

subtitles.original: 上がるから ルーザー
subtitles.english: We rise, loser

subtitles.original: うざいくらいどん底に這いつくばって
subtitles.english: Crawl on the bottom, annoyingly deep

subtitles.original: 這い上がって地獄から勝ったら
subtitles.english: Climb up, and if we win from hell...

subtitles.original: ループに馴染めないルートを無限に
subtitles.english: An infinite route that doesn't fit the loop

subtitles.original: ありふれた道じゃない
subtitles.english: It's not a common road

subtitles.original: 選んだ道を歩むの僕らと
subtitles.english: Walking the path we chose, with us

subtitles.original: 冷めない夢を笑えばいいさ
subtitles.english: You can just laugh at the dream we won't wake up from

subtitles.original: 最大のアンバランス
subtitles.english: The ultimate unbalance

subtitles.original: どうせなら狂おしいほどにしてよ
subtitles.english: If anything, make it maddeningly so

subtitles.original: 初めての涙より狂った覚悟を
subtitles.english: More than your first tears, show me a crazy resolve

subtitles.original: 敗者と勝者のドロー、ドロー、ドロー！
subtitles.english: A draw, draw, draw between winner and loser!

subtitles.original: かき消された不条理なノイズ
subtitles.english: Drowned out, unreasonable noise

subtitles.original: 振り払い Don't worry
subtitles.english: Shake it off, don't worry

subtitles.original: 覚悟さえあれば消えない
subtitles.english: As long as you have resolve, it won't fade

subtitles.original: ２人ならやれるさ
subtitles.english: If it's the two of us, we can do it!
